creator: sdalu@sdalu.com
text:
Build of mariadb102-client failed with the following error (11.1-RELEASE-p1)

: && /usr/bin/c++  -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-rtti -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -isystem /usr/local/include -DDBUG_OFF  -L/usr/local/lib -fstack-protector client/CMakeFiles/mysqladmin.dir/mysqladmin.cc.o client/CMakeFiles/mysqladmin.dir/__/sql/password.c.o  -o client/mysqladmin  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: -pthread libmariadb/libmariadb/libmariadbclient.a mysys/libmysys.a -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so dbug/libdbug.a mysys_ssl/libmysys_ssl.a mysys/libmysys.a dbug/libdbug.a mysys_ssl/libmysys_ssl.a -lz -lm -lexecinfo -lssl -lcrypto strings/libstrings.a -pthread && :
libmariadb/libmariadb/libmariadbclient.a(ma_charset.c.o): In function `mariadb_convert_string':
libmariadb/libmariadb/ma_charset.c:(.text+0xfcd): undefined reference to `iconv_open'
libmariadb/libmariadb/ma_charset.c:(.text+0xff6): undefined reference to `iconv'
libmariadb/libmariadb/ma_charset.c:(.text+0x102d): undefined reference to `iconv_close'
c++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
ninja: build stopped: subcommand failed.
*** Error code 1


I also got the same result after a rm -rf /usr/local /var/db/pkg

But mariadb101-client build fine
